title: onobrychis echinata
intro: Onobrychis echinata, also known as the globe sainfoin or sainfoin, is a perennial legume plant native to Central Asia and Eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis echinata include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
